verses.text: “I am the Lord, your God and Sovereign, Who out of bondage set you free, Who saved you from the land of Egypt. Then serve no other gods but me”.
You shall now to graven idols, For I, a jealous God, your Lord, Shall punish sin in those who hate me, But love all those who keep my Word.
Teach us, Lord God, to love your precepts, The good commandments of your law. Give us the grace to keep your statues With thankfulness and proper awe.
